description: LogRocket is a product analytics and session replay platform for web and mobile applications. It captures user sessions, issues, performance signals, and related behavioral data to help teams debug problems and understand product usage.
summary: LogRocket exposes a project-authenticated REST API on `api.logrocket.com/v1`, a streamable HTTP MCP server at `https://mcp.logrocket.com/mcp`, and an npm-distributed `logrocket` CLI; public docs did not reveal a separate developer GraphQL API endpoint beyond SDK middleware docs.
